history.text: Socialist Republic of Macedonia introduced a new form of state rule.
The independence referendum gave voters a direct role in North Macedonia's move toward sovereignty.

worthSeeing.title: Lake Ohrid:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO lake and town, one of Europe's oldest and deepest lakes.

worthSeeing.title: Ohrid Old Town:
worthSeeing.text: Byzantine churches and medieval architecture on the shores of the lake.

worthSeeing.title: Mavrovo National Park:
worthSeeing.text: Wolves, lynx and bears in a wild mountain landscape with a ski resort.

planningQuestions.q: What is North Macedonia known for?
planningQuestions.a: Lake Ohrid, Ohrid Old Town, Mavrovo National Park.
